description: Lock port_customs_ledgers to written Piraeus-linked tax/account records, not generic customs posts or maritime law.

checks.reason: The scoped claim is anchored to the Athenian grain-tax law of 374/3 BCE.
The source-backed mechanism is a written fiscal/accounting record.
The record includes monetary fees, proceeds, and advances.
The evidence is an inscribed public fiscal law/account record.
A customs post is not the direct source-backed mechanism for this written account record.
General maritime law is broader than the fiscal/accounting mechanism supported by the source.
